description:
This quiz evaluates foundational SQL querying skills, specifically targeting developers who rely heavily on ORMs and need to refresh their raw database knowledge. It maintains a casual, encouraging tone that frames the challenge as a low-pressure skill check rather than a rigorous exam. The difficulty is beginner-to-intermediate, focusing on core query syntax and execution rather than advanced optimization.
Topics: SQL Query Fundamentals, Raw SQL vs ORMs, Database Basics
Audience: Software developers and engineers looking to refresh or validate their core SQL querying skills
